subject: [PATCH v2 21/28] nfsd: allow nfsd4_encode_fattr4_change() to work with no export

2026-04-16.patch_summary: This patch allows the nfsd4_encode_fattr4_change function to work even when there is no export available, which can occur in certain callback scenarios such as CB_NOTIFY. The change ensures that the function behaves correctly and safely by adding a check for the presence of an export before attempting to access it. This modification addresses a potential issue where the function would previously fail or behave unexpectedly without an export.
